creator: saper@saper.info
text:
Created attachment 254144
build log (with ANSI colors)

This is (oldish) FreeBSD 15.0-CURRENT main-n270224-fb623aab3927

Ports tree is at 

# This file is auto-generated by 'make config'.
# Options for rust-1.81.0
_OPTIONS_READ=rust-1.81.0
_FILE_COMPLETE_OPTIONS_LIST=DOCS GDB LTO PORT_LLVM SOURCES WASM
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=DOCS
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=GDB
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=LTO
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=PORT_LLVM
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=SOURCES
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=WASM

I think the build is using installed llvm17 (full log attached)

Linking of rustbook fails like this:
